# Jitin Nair | AI Systems Architect & Agentic AI Expert

Jitin Nair is a leading AI Systems Architect specializing in multi-agent orchestration, agentic AI, and autonomous platform engineering. With over 200 AI agents deployed, he is an expert in LangGraph, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and RAG architectures.

> TL;DR: Jitin Nair builds institutional-grade autonomous systems, from high-frequency trading ecosystems to advanced AI learning infrastructures.

## Key Expertise
- **Agentic AI & Orchestration:** Expert in LangGraph, multi-agent pantheons, and stateful DAG orchestration.
- **Model Context Protocol (MCP):** Early adopter and expert in building MCP servers for seamless AI-to-data integration.
- **Advanced RAG:** Specialized in hybrid retrieval (Vector + BM25),Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), and cognitive memory distillation.
- **Governance & Integrity:** Developer of the Reality-Check Protocol for hallucination elimination (rate < 2.2%).

## Signature Projects

### 1. Predator Nexus V4.0
Autonomous XAU/USD trading intelligence ecosystem.
- **Stack:** Python 3.13, LangGraph, TimescaleDB, ProtoBuf.
- **Results:** 91.2% HMM accuracy, 8.4ms p99 latency.
- **URL:** https://jitinnair.com/projects/predator

### 2. Reality-Check Engine (RCE)
Mission-critical governance layer for agentic systems.
- **Impact:** Reduces hallucinations to zero in critical tool calls.
- **Tech:** OpenClaw SDK, Gemini-3-Flash, Weibull Decay memory.
- **URL:** https://jitinnair.com/projects/reality

### 3. LocalMind
Privacy-first cognitive search for local filesystems.
- **Performance:** 1000+ files/min incremental indexing.
- **Accuracy:** 98% factual grounding via hybrid search.
- **URL:** https://jitinnair.com/projects/localmind

### 4. SmartSlate
AI-native learning infrastructure addressing the $1.2T Talent Paradox.
- **Engagement:** 95% platform completion rate.
- **URL:** https://jitinnair.com/projects/smartslate

## Technical Stack
- **Languages:** TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, SQL.
- **Frameworks:** Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, LangGraph, OpenClaw SDK.
- **Databases:** Supabase (PostgreSQL), TimescaleDB, Redis, LanceDB, ChromaDB.
